325 W Morris Blvd A, Morristown, TN 37813, USA

Pear Tree. 

Pear is hard, semi-gritty texture, and very sweet. Green, brown and black speckled russet type skin. Probably "Bartlett" or "Williams" pear. Ripens in late October. The tree is 40+ years old. 

It is directly under a power line, so be careful
